required_inputs: production OMOP CDM schema loaded into a database
DQD configuration generated for the target CDM version
supported_check_families: row count preview by target table
unsupported_check_families: full conformance checks against a loaded OMOP database
future_integration_path: Generate production OMOP staging tables only after review approval.
Run OHDSI DQD against the target OMOP database.
Import DQD JSON results as an OJTFlow evidence artifact.
Block downstream analytics export when DQD critical checks fail.
warnings: OJTFlow Month 7 preview is DQD-compatible metadata, not a replacement for running OHDSI DQD.
DQD should run after vocabulary resolution and target-database load.
